user.title: EcoFlow PowerOcean
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PowerOcean Plus.

data_description.host: Local IP address of the PowerOcean Plus
data_description.battery_capacity: Usable capacity of your battery module, e.g. 5.0 for a 5 kWh module
data_description.pv_strings: Number of PV strings connected to the inverter (1–3). Unused strings are ignored.
data_description.scan_interval: How often values are polled (2–60 seconds)

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – please check IP address and port
